metadata.description: Skills we share at AI Builder Club for building loop engineers — agents that run, test, ship, and verify their own work. Flagship plugins: codebase-harness and loops.

plugins.name: codebase-harness
plugins.description: Make any repo agent-ready: legible docs/lints, a one-command dev stack, a real e2e gate, an isolated cloud box per agent (crabbox), and verify-before-ship.

plugins.name: loops
plugins.description: Spin up compounding agent loops on a file-based knowledge base (signals/docs/domains + LOG). Bootstraps the substrate on first run.
